energy.label: Electricity
energy.description: Electrical supply available to keep the city and its institutions running.
energy.mechanism_description: Electricity depends on fuel, labor, and the city's ability to keep essential operations functioning.

glossary.quick_explain: Electricity powers the systems that keep the city functional.
glossary.why_it_matters: If power weakens, visible service reliability falls quickly.

tutorial.player_hint: Power still matters here, even though the main crisis is fiscal and political.

water.label: Water Service
water.description: Usable water available to homes and institutions.
water.mechanism_description: Water depends on power, repair capacity, and institutional reliability.

glossary.quick_explain: Water service represents the city's ability to keep clean water reliably available.
glossary.why_it_matters: Service failures are politically visible and socially damaging.

food.label: Food Supply
food.description: Food reserves and distribution support for households and vulnerable groups.
food.mechanism_description: Food security depends on transport, labor, and enough public capacity to keep supplies moving.

glossary.quick_explain: Food supply tracks both stock and the city's ability to move support where it is needed.
glossary.why_it_matters: Food strain damages health, workforce stability, and public trust.

glossary.quick_explain: Health reflects how well residents can withstand service cuts and hardship.
glossary.why_it_matters: Poor health weakens labor capacity and raises visible social strain.

workforce.label: Municipal Workforce
workforce.description: Available labor capacity across city services and institutions.
workforce.mechanism_description: Workforce strength depends on health, labor relations, and the city's ability to keep people engaged.

glossary.quick_explain: Municipal workforce tracks usable staffing strength for services and repairs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low staffing slows repair, transport, and visible service response.

treasury.label: City Budget
treasury.description: The city's remaining fiscal room for emergency action and ongoing services.
treasury.mechanism_description: Budget capacity depends on revenue stability, debt pressure, and political support for difficult choices.

glossary.quick_explain: The city budget limits how much service protection and emergency action remain possible.
glossary.why_it_matters: Fiscal strain is the central pressure in this scenario.

tutorial.player_hint: Budget decisions here are also political decisions.

trust.label: Public Trust
trust.description: How much residents believe the city's response is fair and competent.

glossary.quick_explain: Public trust reflects whether people still believe city leaders will protect essential services fairly.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low trust makes every service cut more politically dangerous.

legitimacy.label: City Legitimacy
legitimacy.description: The perceived right of city leadership to direct painful emergency choices.

glossary.quick_explain: Legitimacy is the belief that city leaders still have the right to govern through the crisis.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low legitimacy makes cuts and bargains harder to sustain.

logistics.label: Service Throughput
logistics.description: How much movement, repair, and frontline delivery the city can still carry out.
logistics.mechanism_description: Throughput depends on transit, institutions, staffing, and whether disruptions stay manageable.

glossary.quick_explain: Service throughput tracks whether the city can still carry out what it plans.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak throughput turns every policy into a slower and less visible response.

glossary.quick_explain: Water service is the function households and institutions rely on.
glossary.why_it_matters: Service failure would make the fiscal crisis immediately more visible.

heating_access.label: Heating Access
heating_access.description: Reliable heating for homes and key facilities.

glossary.quick_explain: Heating access tracks whether power and fuel are still keeping people safe.
glossary.why_it_matters: Visible hardship from cold quickly worsens public anger.

food_distribution.label: Food Distribution
food_distribution.description: Movement of food support to households and institutions.

glossary.quick_explain: Food distribution matters because support still has to reach people.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak delivery spreads hardship even when resources exist.

transport_access.label: Transit and Transport Access
transport_access.description: Movement of people, goods, and repairs through the city.
transport_access.failure_text: Transport access may bottleneck relief and service work.

glossary.quick_explain: Transit and transport access show whether the city can still move what it needs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Transport weakness quickly spreads service pain.

medical_care.label: Medical Care
medical_care.description: Capacity to keep public health services functioning.
medical_care.failure_text: Medical care may become less reliable.

glossary.quick_explain: Medical care reflects whether public health institutions still have enough support.
glossary.why_it_matters: Visible hospital strain is socially and politically costly.

emergency_response.label: Emergency Response
emergency_response.description: City ability to react quickly to escalating problems.

glossary.quick_explain: Emergency response combines money, staffing, and working institutions.
glossary.why_it_matters: Slow response makes leadership look weaker.

public_order.label: Public Order
public_order.description: Visible social stability and manageable disruption.

glossary.quick_explain: Public order shows whether civic stress is spilling into visible instability.
glossary.why_it_matters: Disorder can deepen both fiscal and political crisis.

materials.label: Repair Materials
materials.description: Materials used to keep service infrastructure functioning.

labor_hours.label: Labor Hours
labor_hours.description: Useful labor available for city services and repair.

energy_instability.label: Power may fail soon
energy_instability.summary: Electricity is at risk of falling below what services need.
energy_instability.if_ignored: If power weakens, visible service reliability may collapse quickly.
energy_instability.mitigation_hint: Protect power and avoid letting infrastructure strain spread.

water_shortage.label: Water delivery may break down
water_shortage.if_ignored: If water weakens further, public health and trust may fall.
water_shortage.mitigation_hint: Protect power, repairs, and frontline support.

food_collapse.label: Food support is running low
food_collapse.summary: Food reserves and distribution support are under strain.
food_collapse.if_ignored: If food keeps falling, neighborhood hardship will grow.
food_collapse.mitigation_hint: Protect distribution and visible frontline services.

budget_erosion.label: The budget is under pressure
budget_erosion.summary: Debt and spending pressure are shrinking fiscal room.
budget_erosion.if_ignored: If the budget keeps shrinking, harder political choices may become unavoidable.
budget_erosion.mitigation_hint: Weigh every purchase against the broader fiscal and political tradeoff.

unrest_spike.label: Workforce strain is rising
unrest_spike.summary: Labor and community tension are rising.
unrest_spike.if_ignored: If strain rises further, service reliability and trust may fall together.
unrest_spike.mitigation_hint: Protect frontline services and watch labor costs.

institutional_breakdown.label: Institutions may jam up
institutional_breakdown.summary: Transit, budget coordination, and service delivery are under pressure.
institutional_breakdown.if_ignored: If institutions stall, the city may fail even where supplies still exist.
institutional_breakdown.mitigation_hint: Reduce bottlenecks and keep visible services functioning.

political_stalemate.label: Support for strong action is weakening
political_stalemate.summary: Coalition support is fragile across labor, neighborhoods, and creditors.
political_stalemate.if_ignored: If support falls further, strong policies may become politically unavailable.
political_stalemate.mitigation_hint: Choose actions that are defensible as well as efficient.

public_trust_collapse.label: Public trust is slipping
public_trust_collapse.summary: Residents are losing confidence in the city's response.
public_trust_collapse.if_ignored: If trust falls, backlash and instability may spread faster.
public_trust_collapse.mitigation_hint: Protect the services people see most directly.

commuters.label: Transit Riders
commuters.description: Residents relying on functioning urban services.

public_workers.label: Public Workers
public_workers.description: Workers facing wage restraint, layoffs, and service strain.

low_income_neighborhoods.label: Low-Income Neighborhoods
low_income_neighborhoods.description: Communities most exposed to service withdrawal and trust loss.
